{{Quote|We just lost the Tibanna colonies on Bespin, Ossus will fall within days.|[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Game" />}}
The '''Battle of Bespin''' was a battle during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Glynn-Beti]], it was initially a loss for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] had launched an invasion force upon [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] as its [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas refineries were the main source of energy for the Republic's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] aboard [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and were considered a Republic weapons factory by the Separatists. The battle ended in a Separatist victory.<ref name="Game" /><ref name="TNEC" /> The Republic would later retake the world and the two sides would skirmish over it for the rest of the war.<ref name="Campaign" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Bespin is first mentioned as a loss for the Republic in a cutscene after the final mission on [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] released in 2002. This is agreed upon by other sources such as the ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', released in 2005. However, in ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Tethan Battle Adventure]]'', the outcome of the battle is left largely unresolved. Master Glynn-Beti tells the reader character to help evacuate the city; alternate story branches have the character escape with [[Raan Calrissian]] amidst the battle. Further complicating matters, ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'', released in 2009, indicates that the Republic wages "a number of small orbital battles, punctuated by lengthy dogfights in Bespin's upper atmosphere" that result in an eventual Republic victory.
